snippet.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
snippet.description:
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

Stay connected:
cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2
x.com/edgerunners
facebook.com/edgerunners
instagram.com/Edgerunners

Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.

snippet.title: Werwulf - Official Trailer (2026) Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Willem Dafoe, Lily-Rose Depp
snippet.description:
Robert Eggers returns to helm this adaptation of the Wolfman myth, promising to be the most visceral and haunting experience Eggers has done so far! 

In the Medieval English countryside, a mysterious and terrible creature stalks the night, preying on any who come across its path. 

Werewulf see's Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Willem Dafoe, and Lily-Rose Depp returning from their work together on Eggers last movie; Nosferatu, for an all new terrifying take on the classic mythos. 

Werwulf comes to cinemas on December 25th 2026!

snippet.title: Anno 117: Pax Romana - The Hippodrome Trailer: Part One
snippet.description:
The first part of a three-part trailer series for Anno 117: Pax Romana’s second DLC, The Hippodrome! Building the Hippodrome is no easy feat; it’s the largest monument in Latium (we really mean it). It can be unlocked with the Patricians and requires a great deal of resources. Can you master all five stages of construction?

About Anno 117: Pax Romana:
In the latest instalment of the award-winning Anno strategy franchise, it’s your destiny to shape the Roman Empire in the year 117 AD. As governor, will you encourage economic growth or expand your rule through dominance? Lead with rebellion or unite a diverse culture? 
The cost of peace is yours to decide.

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

© Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.

In the latest instalment of the award-winning Anno strategy franchise, it’s your destiny to shape the Roman Empire in the year 117 AD. As governor, will you encourage economic growth or expand your rule through dominance? Lead with rebellion or unite a diverse culture? 
The cost of peace is yours to decide.

snippet.title: YPC SALT 2026 - OFFICIAL TRAILER!
snippet.description:
Wir feiern eine Premiere, denn mit dem YPC SALT geht unser erstes SALZWASSER-Turnier an den Start! Für die erste Staffel haben wir uns nicht LUMPen lassen und sind an ein absolutes Sehnsuchtsziel für jeden Raubfischangler gereist: Norwegen! 🇳🇴🎣
Ihr könnt euch auf insgesamt 8 hochkarätige Teams mit Salz in den Adern (und Nays!) freuen! Außerdem auf eine atemberaubende Kulisse, wechselhaftes und unberechenbares Wetter, brachiale Drills und natürlich den ein oder anderen kapitalen Meeresräuber!
Egal ob kampfstarker Köhler, aggressiver Pollack, dicker Dorsch oder massiver Heilbutt – dieses Turnier verlangt den Teilnehmern alles ab. Wer holt sich die erste Salzwasser-Krone? 👑🌊

Am 05.07.2026 um 18 Uhr geht's los - hier schon einmal der offizielle Trailer zum Einpeitschen! Viel Spaß 😎🔥

🎥 Kamera: Tadilua Tuzolana, Jochen Leppin, Eric Lattermann, Jean Borucki
🎞 Rohschnitt: Jean Borucki
✨Finalcut: Jean Borucki
🖼 Animationen & Grafiken: Dawid Wyrzykiewicz, Tadilua Tuzolana 
🗣️ Sprecher: Charles Rettinghaus
📄 Skript: Alexander Rugulies
✏️ Übersetzung: Madeline Tschauder, Marie Eigner
